goal: Compare Weight Decay (lambda=0.01) vs No Regularization on a 3-layer MLP for CIFAR-10 classification. Hypothesis: Weight decay improves generalization by penalizing large weights, reducing overfitting on small datasets. Use MLP (3072→512→256→10 with ReLU), raw PyTorch training loop, 3 seeds (42, 123, 456), 10 epochs, 2000 training samples via torchvision.datasets.CIFAR10(root='/Users/william/.cache/torch/cifar10', download=False). Measure test accuracy. Paired t-test + Cohen's d.
